title: scutellaria fraxinea
intro: Scutellaria fraxinea, also known as Baikal skullcap, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Siberia and the Russian Far East. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria fraxinea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit neuroprotective properties. Scutellaria fraxinea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
